channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in Kotlin (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in Kotlin nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 yjeanrenaud/yj_nearbyglasses (1512 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: yjeanrenaud

📝 Repository: yjeanrenaud/yj_nearbyglasses

📄 Descrizione: attempting to detect smart glasses nearby and warn you

⭐ Stelle: 1512

🍴 Forks: 66

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: android android-app meta privacy privacy-protection ray-ban-meta-smart-glasses self-defense smartglasses smartphone

📜 Licenza: GNU Affero General Public License v3.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-11T13:56:36Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-12T00:33:10Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

📝 Repository: rohanarun/phoneclaw

item.title: 📝 Natfii/ZeroClaw-Android (219 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: Natfii

📝 Repository: Natfii/ZeroClaw-Android

📄 Descrizione: Run AI agents 24/7 on your Android phone. Native Rust core, 25+ providers (OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Groq, DeepSeek, Ollama), encrypted key storage, plugin browser, Material You UI. Self-hosted alternative to Mac Mini setups. MIT licensed.

⭐ Stelle: 219

🍴 Forks: 35

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

🏷️ Topics: ai-agent ai-agent-framework android anthropic deepseek encrypted-storage gemini grok iot jetpack-compose kotlin llm material-you mqtt ollama openai openclaw rust self-hosted zeroclaw

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-16T01:20:24Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-07T02:59:32Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 xigua222/photoo (187 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: xigua222

📝 Repository: xigua222/photoo

📄 Descrizione: photoo 是一款 Android 原生的极简照片整理工具。滑动卡片就能快速整理相册——左滑删除，右滑收藏，上滑保留。还有一系列"该有的全都有"的功能：相册分析生成专属摄影画像、沉浸式回顾喜爱照片、智能识别相似照片和低质量图片、视频和图片压缩...... 但 photoo 不只是一个"清理"软件，它更是"回忆"。

⭐ Stelle: 187

🍴 Forks: 4

💻 Linguaggio: Kotlin

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-08T13:30:10Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-09T01:59:47Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
